arts.sum: Monza go into this round off a 3-0 defeat to Cagliari, as they collapsed in the second half after a positive start in the opening 45 minutes. Como share points with Empoli in a lively 1-1 draw that f...
Napoli are hoping to close the gap to league leaders Inter Milan at the top of the Serie A standings and Aaron Rogan has predictions for all 10 games in Italy's top-flight this weekend.
